question: What is the legal name of your company?
helperText: Provide the exact registered name of your business as per your GST/PAN documents.
guidanceTitle: Tips for Entering Company Name
guidanceTips: Enter the full legal name of your company as it appears on your GST registration certificate and PAN card.
Avoid using abbreviations, acronyms, or informal names. The name should match your official business documents.
If your company has multiple locations, use the name of the primary/registered office location.

question: What is your business registration number?
helperText: This is the unique identification number assigned to your business by the government. It is typically a combination of letters and numbers.
guidanceTitle: Guidance for Providing Business Registration Number
guidanceTips: The business registration number is typically a 10-15 digit alphanumeric code that uniquely identifies your business entity.
This number is often referred to as the Goods and Services Tax Identification Number (GSTIN) or the Permanent Account Number (PAN).
Make sure to enter the exact number as it appears on your business registration documents or certificates.

question: What is your business's Goods and Services Tax (GST) registration number?
helperText: The GST number is a unique 15-digit identification number assigned to your business by the Indian government. It is mandatory for all businesses registered under the GST Act.
guidanceTitle: Guidance for providing your GST number
guidanceTips: Ensure you enter the exact 15-digit GST number as it appears on your GST registration certificate.
The GST number follows a specific format: XX-AAAAA-NNNN-Z-Y-Z, where XX is the state code, AAAAA is the PAN-based business entity number, NNNN is a unique number, and Z and Y are check digits.
If you have recently registered for GST, make sure to use the new GST number and not the old VAT/Service Tax registration number.

question: What is your company's Permanent Account Number (PAN)?
helperText: PAN is a unique 10-digit alphanumeric number issued by the Income Tax Department of India. It is mandatory for all businesses to have a valid PAN.
guidanceTitle: Guidance for Providing PAN Number
guidanceTips: The PAN number should be in the format: ABCDE1234X, where A-E are uppercase letters and 1234 are digits.
Ensure that the PAN number you provide is registered in the name of your business entity.
If you do not have a PAN number yet, you can apply for one through the Income Tax Department's e-filing portal.

question: What is the primary business type or industry of your organization?
helperText: Select the option that best describes your primary business activities.
guidanceTitle: Guidance on selecting the right business type
guidanceTips: Choose the industry that accounts for the majority of your revenue and operations.
If your business activities span multiple industries, select the one that is the core focus.
If your business type is not listed, select 'Other' and provide more details in the next field.

question: What is the year your business was established?
helperText: Enter the 4-digit year your business was officially registered or started operations.
guidanceTitle: Guidance for Entering Year of Establishment
guidanceTips: The year of establishment should be the year your business was officially registered or started operations, not the year you started planning the business.
If you're not sure of the exact year, provide your best estimate based on official records or founding documents.
The year should be a 4-digit number between 1900 and the current year. Do not enter a range of years.

question: What is the total number of employees in your business?
placeholder: Enter the exact number of employees
helperText: Please provide the current total number of employees in your business. This information is required to calculate the appropriate insurance coverage and premium.
guidanceTitle: Guidance on Providing the Number of Employees
guidanceTips: Count all full-time, part-time, and contractual employees working in your business.
Ensure the number you provide is the exact current total, not a range or estimate.
This information is crucial for the insurance provider to assess the risk and offer the right business package coverage.

question: What is your company's total annual revenue?
placeholder: Enter your annual revenue in INR
helperText: Please provide your company's total revenue for the last financial year. This information is required to calculate the appropriate insurance coverage and premium.
guidanceTitle: Guidance for Providing Annual Revenue
guidanceTips: Enter the exact annual revenue figure, do not provide a range.
Ensure the revenue figure includes all sources of income for your business, such as sales, services, and other operating revenue.
If your business operates on a fiscal year different from the calendar year, provide the revenue for the most recently completed fiscal year.

question: What is the complete address of your business?
helperText: Provide the full address including street, city, state, and PIN code.
guidanceTitle: Tips for Entering Your Business Address
guidanceTips: Include the building number, street name, locality, city, state, and PIN code.
Ensure the address matches your GST and PAN registration documents.
Provide the address where the majority of your business operations take place.

question: What is the city where your business is located?
helperText: Select the city where your business is registered or headquartered.
guidanceTitle: Guidance for Filling the City Field
guidanceTips: Provide the exact city where your business is located, not the broader state or region.
If your business has multiple locations, select the primary or registered office address.
Ensure the city name is spelled correctly and matches the legal registration documents.

question: In which state is your business located?
options: Dadra and Nagar Haveli and Daman and Diu
helperText: Select the state where your business is registered and operating.
guidanceTitle: Guidance for Selecting the State
guidanceTips: Choose the state that matches the registered address of your business.
If your business operates in multiple states, select the state where your primary operations are located.
Ensure that the state selected matches the information provided in your GST registration and other official documents.

question: What is the PIN code of your business location?
helperText: The PIN code is a 6-digit postal code used in India to facilitate mail delivery. Please enter the PIN code of your primary business location.
guidanceTitle: Guidance for entering the PIN code
guidanceTips: The PIN code must be a 6-digit number without any spaces or special characters.
The first digit cannot be 0, as Indian PIN codes start from 100001.
You can find the PIN code of your business location by searching online or contacting your local post office.

question: Who is the primary contact person for this insurance policy?
placeholder: Enter full name of contact person
helperText: Provide the full legal name of the primary contact person for this policy.
guidanceTitle: Guidance for Contact Person Name
guidanceTips: Enter the full legal name as it appears on government-issued ID documents like Aadhaar or PAN card.
Avoid using initials or nicknames. The name should match official records.
If the contact person is not an employee (e.g., insurance broker), provide their full legal name.

question: What is your business email address?
helperText: Please provide a valid email address associated with your business. This will be used for all communication regarding your insurance policy.
guidanceTitle: Entering a Valid Business Email Address
guidanceTips: Use an email address that is associated with your registered business, not a personal email.
Ensure the email address is spelled correctly and does not contain any typos.
Avoid using generic email addresses like info@, contact@, or hello@. Use a more specific address if possible.
If you don't have a dedicated business email, consider setting one up with your domain name or a professional email service.

question: Phone Number
helperText: Enter Phone Number
guidanceTitle: Phone Number
guidanceTips: Enter accurate information for Phone Number

question: When would you like your business insurance policy to start?
helperText: The policy period is typically 1 year. Please select a start date within the next 12 months.
guidanceTitle: Selecting the Correct Policy Start Date
guidanceTips: Choose a start date that aligns with your business operations and renewal preferences.
Ensure the start date is not in the past, as policies cannot be backdated.
Consider factors like your current insurance expiry, GST filing, and business planning when selecting the start date.

question: When would you like the policy to end?
helperText: The policy period is typically 1 year. Please select the desired end date for your coverage.
guidanceTitle: Guidance for Selecting the Policy End Date
guidanceTips: The policy end date should be 1 year from the start date of the coverage.
Ensure the end date falls within the current Indian financial year (April 1st to March 31st).
Consider your business operations and any seasonal factors that may impact your insurance needs.

question: What is the total coverage amount required for your business package insurance?
helperText: The coverage amount should be the total value of your business assets, inventory, and potential liabilities that you want to insure.
guidanceTitle: Determining the Right Coverage Amount
guidanceTips: Consider the total value of your business premises, equipment, furniture, inventory, and any potential legal liabilities.
Review your previous insurance policies or financial statements to estimate the appropriate coverage amount.
Keep in mind that the coverage amount should be sufficient to fully protect your business in case of any unforeseen events or claims.

question: What is the name of your current insurance provider for your business?
placeholder: Enter the name of your current insurance provider
helperText: Provide the exact name of the insurance company that currently provides coverage for your business.
guidanceTitle: Guidance for Entering Current Insurance Provider
guidanceTips: Be sure to enter the full legal name of the insurance company, not just a shortened version or abbreviation.
If you have multiple insurance policies, provide the name of the provider for your primary or most comprehensive business insurance policy.
Ensure the spelling and capitalization matches the official name used by the insurance provider.

question: Please provide details of any previous insurance claims made by your business in the last 5 years.
helperText: Provide a brief summary of the nature, date, and amount of any previous insurance claims. This will help us assess the risk profile of your business.
guidanceTitle: Guidance for Providing Previous Claims History
guidanceTips: Be as detailed and accurate as possible when describing previous claims. This information is crucial for the insurer to evaluate your risk profile.
Include the policy number, claim date, nature of the claim (e.g., fire, theft, liability), and the amount claimed and/or settled.
If you have not made any previous claims, simply state 'No previous claims' in the field.

question: Please describe the risk management measures in place for your business operations.
helperText: Provide details on the safety, security, and risk mitigation measures implemented in your business.
guidanceTitle: Guidance on Risk Management Measures
guidanceTips: Outline the specific procedures, policies, and systems you have in place to identify, assess, and mitigate risks to your business operations.
Explain how you monitor and review your risk management practices to ensure they remain effective.
Highlight any industry-specific risk management certifications or standards your business has achieved, such as ISO 31000 or COSO ERM.
